channel.desc: News for Punjabis, by Punjabis. World Punjabi TV is your 24/7 channel for news, interviews, and live events, including daily broadcasts from Gurudwara Nadha Sahib. Your connection to home, wherever you are.

Living India News is a popular channel that offers a wide range of news coverage, including Punjab, national, and international news. What sets us apart is our engaging debates on contemporary topics and special series shows that are both informative and interesting. News on specific topics, we've got you covered. From business and markets to technology and sports, Living India News provides in-depth coverage of current events. Our debates and discussions feature expert analysis and diverse perspectives, making them a great resource for staying informed.
Gurbani Tv Channel with non-stop Kirtan, Kathas and Sikh Religious Channel.

TV Punjab provides authentic and credible news and high-quality entertainment content featuring Punjabi language. Television Punjab content is designed to reflex the various cultural elements of Punjab.
Saga Music is a 24/7 channel dedicated to serving Punjabi music content globally, showcasing a diverse array of genres including Folk, Pop, Sufi, Hip Hop, and Rap.

We've got a time machine, the one which takes you into the world full of enchanting tales from the land of miracles, India. Would you like to time travel to the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s and more to watch Bollywood legends create history with their exceptional performances, phenomenal dialogues and iconic song and dance? With a snap of a finger, with a button on a remote, Bollywood Classic will teleport you into the high definition world loaded with Bollywood classic movies, evergreen melodies, real life stories of the world famous icons and much more than you can imagine. This exclusive one of its kind channel, is home to legends like Raj Kapoor, Dev Anand, Rajesh Khanna, Amitabh Bachchan, Madhubala, Nargis, Zeenat Aman, Madhuri Dixit and more. the entire Bollywood classic collection, which grows every single month, and that too in your preferred language. Don't waste a single minute, or you'll miss this blast from the past, which is waiting to take you back.

A magical world awaits you, a single destination where lives glamour, fantasies and dreams. A world so colourful and real where you can literally touch, feel and become a part of the stories you see, a world of high definition. This perfect place of entertainment is called, Bollywood HD, a channel which offers treats from the world’s biggest producer of movies, Bollywood, all at your fingertips, exclusively for you. Tune in to experience larger than life blockbusters stories every single day, all year around. This one stop starry shop not just offers hot and sizzling premieres every month, but also gives you an upclose & personal peak into the gossip and news on the lives of the glamour Bollywood celebrities. Leave your worries behind and escape into the starlit world of Bollywood HD today.

Zee BollyWorld is a dynamic FAST Bollywood Movie channel that takes you back to the glorious 'Evergreen Age' of Indian Hindi Cinema. This is a curation of cinematic treasures to celebrate the legacy of Indian Cinema.

Willow Sports is the free home for cricket in North America. The best of live and on-demand action from around the world is available, from ICC World Cups to the IPL. Also, other action packed live sports that will have you on the edge of your seat.

FAST moving 24/7 Sports News Network, daily breaking news about global sports, with interviews, features and highlights of the biggest sports events from over 200 sports federations. Covers sports from US and all around the world, EPL, NBA, NFL, MLB, F1, golf, tennis, cricket, etc.
A free, 24/7 English language LIVE sports, news, analysis and highlights network that brings everyone closer to the game.
SportsTVplus - All sports all the time 24-7 auto racing, BMX, basketball, beach volleyball, combat sports, football, golf, soccer, and many more. Find your game, highlights & news right here!

TNA Wrestling puts the spotlight on 20+ years of professional wrestling action, featuring addictive storylines, awe-inspiring athleticism and larger-than-life personalities. Relive all-time classics, modern masterpieces, plus original series.

FTF Sports is an emerging worldwide network offering engaging video content established to serve the passionate fan's appreciation for competition, sportsmanship, and performance. FTF Sports features a 24/7 broadcast, including live games & events, interviews, predictions, analysis, and a variety of dynamic, original programming.

Chardikla Time TV North America brings you 24/7 Punjabi news, entertainment, and cultural programming, serving the vibrant Punjabi and South Asian communities across North America. Experience exclusive coverage of major community events, including Bangla Sahib, Patna Sahib, Yuba City Nagar Kirtan, Los Angeles Nagar Kirtan, Holla Mohalla Riverside, Boston Bhangra, Sikh Day Parade New York, South Asian Showdown, Kabaddi, Soccer, and Field Hockey. Chardikla Time TV North America is your go-to destination for authentic Punjabi content. Watch live now and stay connected to your roots!

Chardikla Time TV is a top-ranking Free-to-Air Infotainment channel from Punjab, known for its live Gurbani telecast from sacred sites. It features news analysis, talk shows, crime series, documentaries, and social discussions. Catering to all age groups, it offers diverse content and strong engagement, making it a trusted choice for advertisers and viewers worldwide.

Chardikla Gurbaani TV, with the motto “A Bliss to Humanity,” is a 24×7 Free Sikh Devotional Channel available globally on various platforms. It features live telecasts from Takhat Sri Harimandir Ji Patna Sahib, Gurdwara Sri Bangla Sahib, and special broadcasts from North America. Dedicated to Sikh teachings, history, Katha, Kirtan, and Dhadhi shows, it spreads the message of Gurbani worldwide.

programme.title: Anhonee
programme.desc: Dr Rekha admits a patient, Sunil, in her mental hospital and soon, he responds to the treatment and recovers. They fall in love with each other but everything is not as it seems to be.

programme.title: Kanoon 1960
programme.desc: A lawyer decides to defend a man who has been falsely accused of murder as he knows the real killer is his future father-in-law, who is also the judge presiding over the case.

programme.title: Ek Hi Raasta
programme.desc: Amar and Malti, two orphans, lead a harmonious life with their son, Raja. However, Amar gets murdered and circumstances force Malti to marry Amar's boss, Prakash, which is not accepted by Raja.

programme.title: Karm
programme.desc: Asha and Arvind are in love but are not allowed to marry by her astrologer father. They start living together and plan to start a family without getting married, but fate intervenes.

programme.title: Apne Rang Hazaar
programme.desc: Sunil, a nonchalant playboy, loves flirting with girls. Soon, his life changes forever when his uncle gets murdered under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Awam
programme.desc: A captain discovers that his assignment to work with a defence minister is a front for government espionage, and is pulled into a complex tangle of deceit in the struggle to keep his country safe.

programme.title: Meri Zabaan
programme.desc: An editor of a popular publication goes missing just as he is about to expose some corrupt people. Years later, his son, Krishna, sets out to uncover the mystery of his disappearance.

programme.title: Namak
programme.desc: When Gopal, a servant, is announced as the heir to his employer's estate, the siblings of his master's family plot against him.

programme.title: Azaad Desh Ke Gulam
programme.desc: Bharti, a law student from a rich family, lives a comfortable life. Her life changes when she learns that her father is in illegal activities.

programme.title: Naina 1973
programme.desc: A woman becomes the second wife of Ravi, a sophisticated aristocrat. However, she is tormented by constant comparisons with Ravi's deceased first love.

programme.title: Mohabbat Ki Arzoo
programme.desc: A motor mechanic posing as a rich man falls in love with a girl from a wealthy family pretending to be poor. The lovers rebel against their family members and society to remain together.

programme.title: Dharmputra
programme.desc: During British rule in India, the families of Nawab Badruddin and Gulshan Rai share a close bond with each other. However, an unplanned pregnancy and a child born out of wedlock change this dynamic.

programme.title: Kal Ki Awaz
programme.desc: When a bank chairman's son is abducted and held for ransom, DSP Ali intervenes but cannot save the child. Later, his world is turned upside down when his daughter is kidnapped.

programme.title: Aurat Teri Yehi Kahani
programme.desc: Savitri, a motherless girl, is forced to marry an elderly man for her family's sake. However, after her husband's sudden death, her life takes a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Humse Na Jeeta Koi
programme.desc: Three brothers, Bheema, Kishan, and Vijay, navigate romance, mischief and duty as they diligently strive to fulfil their parents' wishes.

programme.title: Dahleez
programme.desc: Naini and Shekhar love each other, but due to a misunderstanding, she decides to leave him and marry another man. However, her whole world comes crashing down when Shekhar reappears in her life.

programme.title: Kaash
programme.desc: A film actor takes to alcohol after suffering huge losses, which in turn, takes a toll on his marriage and his wife leaves him. But when their child falls terminally ill, they reconcile for his sake.

programme.title: Kanoon 1960
programme.desc: A lawyer decides to defend a man who has been falsely accused of murder as he knows the real killer is his future father-in-law, who is also the judge presiding over the case.

programme.title: Karishmaa
programme.desc: Sunny, a fashion photographer, gets embroiled in an unnecessary controversy when two of his model friends are murdered. When his girlfriend is made the next target, he strives to save her.

programme.title: Gair
programme.desc: An abandoned child raised by a wealthy household takes over the family business. However, he is resented by their natural son who, fueled by a bitter uncle, tries his best to make him lose face.

programme.title: Nishchaiy
programme.desc: 2 brothers, Ravi and Rohan separated due to unforeseen circumstances created by Ravi's employer. Years later Ravi, who is released from prison and Rohan, a successful lawyer clash with each other unaware of the fact that they are real brothers.

programme.title: Haseena Maan Jayegi 1968
programme.desc: Rakesh and Kamal, doppelgangers of one another, fall for the same woman, Archana. However, when their petty rivalry evolves into something more sinister, she must find her true love.

programme.title: Insaaf Apne Lahoo Se
programme.desc: Mahendra Pratap marries Geeta, but asks Devilal, her first son, to leave the house. Later, Geeta gets arrested for murder due to her husband's false testimony and gives birth to another son in prison.

programme.title: Mera Pati Sirf Mera Hai
programme.desc: Roopa does not get along with Prakash, her husband, and suspects he is having an affair. Things take a turn when she starts spreading vile rumours about Sharda, a woman living next door.

programme.title: Diljalaa
programme.desc: A girl's father selects a groom for her who happens to be the son of his employer but on the day of engagement, she not only rejects but also humiliates him.

programme.title: Waqt 1965
programme.desc: A businessman's family is torn apart by an earthquake and reunited years later in a courtroom trial where father and sons stand opposed in the roles of accused, lawyer and testifying witness.

programme.title: Anhonee
programme.desc: Dr Rekha admits a patient, Sunil, in her mental hospital and soon, he responds to the treatment and recovers. They fall in love with each other but everything is not as it seems to be.

programme.desc: Savitri, a motherless girl, is forced to marry an elderly man for her family's sake. However, after her husband's sudden death, her life takes a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Humse Na Jeeta Koi
programme.desc: Three brothers, Bheema, Kishan, and Vijay, navigate romance, mischief and duty as they diligently strive to fulfil their parents' wishes.

programme.title: Dahleez
programme.desc: Naini and Shekhar love each other, but due to a misunderstanding, she decides to leave him and marry another man. However, her whole world comes crashing down when Shekhar reappears in her life.

programme.title: Kaash
programme.desc: A film actor takes to alcohol after suffering huge losses, which in turn, takes a toll on his marriage and his wife leaves him. But when their child falls terminally ill, they reconcile for his sake.

programme.title: Kanoon 1960
programme.desc: A lawyer decides to defend a man who has been falsely accused of murder as he knows the real killer is his future father-in-law, who is also the judge presiding over the case.

programme.title: Karishmaa
programme.desc: Sunny, a fashion photographer, gets embroiled in an unnecessary controversy when two of his model friends are murdered. When his girlfriend is made the next target, he strives to save her.

programme.title: Gair
programme.desc: An abandoned child raised by a wealthy household takes over the family business. However, he is resented by their natural son who, fueled by a bitter uncle, tries his best to make him lose face.

programme.title: Nishchaiy
programme.desc: 2 brothers, Ravi and Rohan separated due to unforeseen circumstances created by Ravi's employer. Years later Ravi, who is released from prison and Rohan, a successful lawyer clash with each other unaware of the fact that they are real brothers.

programme.title: Haseena Maan Jayegi 1968
programme.desc: Rakesh and Kamal, doppelgangers of one another, fall for the same woman, Archana. However, when their petty rivalry evolves into something more sinister, she must find her true love.

programme.title: Insaaf Apne Lahoo Se
programme.desc: Mahendra Pratap marries Geeta, but asks Devilal, her first son, to leave the house. Later, Geeta gets arrested for murder due to her husband's false testimony and gives birth to another son in prison.

programme.title: Mera Pati Sirf Mera Hai
programme.desc: Roopa does not get along with Prakash, her husband, and suspects he is having an affair. Things take a turn when she starts spreading vile rumours about Sharda, a woman living next door.

programme.title: Diljalaa
programme.desc: A girl's father selects a groom for her who happens to be the son of his employer but on the day of engagement, she not only rejects but also humiliates him.

programme.title: Waqt 1965
programme.desc: A businessman's family is torn apart by an earthquake and reunited years later in a courtroom trial where father and sons stand opposed in the roles of accused, lawyer and testifying witness.

programme.title: Ghar Jamai
programme.desc: Dwarka, a millionaire, is impressed by Anil, a principled man, and wants him to marry Mona, his daughter. However, after their marriage, he compels him to move into his house.

programme.title: Doodh Ka Karz
programme.desc: Sapheran Parvati, along with her newborn son, Suraj, watches helplessly as her husband, Gangu, is wrongly accused of theft, and then beaten to death. Parvati is all set to avenge Gangu's death.

programme.title: Mohabbat 1997
programme.desc: Gaurav and Rohit, two best friends, fall in love with Shweta. After a traumatic accident, Rohit dies and Shweta gets engaged to Gaurav, who seems to be hiding a deadly secret.

programme.title: Khoon Ka Karz
programme.desc: Raised by Savitri, orphans Kishan and Arjun grow up to become gangsters. Karan, her another foster child shows them the right path.

programme.title: Kyaa Kool Hain Hum
programme.desc: Rahul is told by a street astrologer that he will find his soul-mate in a girl who has a birthmark on her right breast. Urmila Martodkar walks into his life, birthmark and all. But what they don’t know is that she is not a girl, but is a gay boy.

programme.title: Koi Aap Sa
programme.desc: Simran helps her best friend, Rohan, win over the girl he likes, Preeti. However, trouble ensues when Simran gets pregnant and Rohan is forced to marry her.

programme.title: Zakhm
programme.desc: A boy, born into a family of varying religions, finds himself embroiled in communal riots. Soon, his mother's death becomes an issue raised to fulfil political agendas.

programme.title: Nishchaiy
programme.desc: 2 brothers, Ravi and Rohan separated due to unforeseen circumstances created by Ravi's employer. Years later Ravi, who is released from prison and Rohan, a successful lawyer clash with each other unaware of the fact that they are real brothers.

programme.title: Shootout At Wadala
programme.desc: The first-ever registered encounter by the Mumbai Police, which took place on November 1, 1982. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Shootout at Lokhandwala
programme.desc: The story of a tough police officer battling a gangster who is challenging the mafia boss. Their mutual obsession with outdoing each other takes a toll on their personal lives

programme.title: Madhoshi
programme.desc: Despite being engaged to Arpit, Anupama falls in love with Aman, a stranger. However, when her family members decide to meet him, they are shocked to discover that a person named Aman does not exist.

programme.title: Raju Ban Gaya Gentleman
programme.desc: Raju, is comming to Bomaby and start working as a engineer in a company where is boss and the boss's daughtert, Sapna Chhabria who starts to make plans about Raju's bright future, which comes at a heavy price, as he does makes compromises.

programme.title: Lucky: No Time for Love
programme.desc: The daughters of the Indian Ambassador in Russia, is being molested by a young Russian. She manages to escape and hide in a parked car, belongs to Aditya.

programme.title: Shootout At Wadala
programme.desc: The first-ever registered encounter by the Mumbai Police, which took place on November 1, 1982. Based on a true story.

programme.title: The Murderer: Hamilton Palace
programme.desc: Rocky, a well-known singer and performer at an elite hotel, becomes the prime suspect when Maheema, a news reporter who was deeply in love with him, is found dead.

programme.title: Krishna Cottage
programme.desc: A group of college students are forced to take shelter in the mysterious Krishna Cottage for the night. Little do they know that a spirit haunts the cottage.

programme.title: Kucch To Hai
programme.desc: A group of friends accidentally throw professor Bakshi off a cliff after seeing a corpse in his house. Years later, during a reunion, they are stalked by a mysterious killer.

programme.title: Kasak
programme.desc: Divya, a young woman, loves Suraj, who dies an untimely death. She is soon forced to marry Vijay due to familial pressure but demands that he divorce her.

programme.title: Shootout at Lokhandwala
programme.desc: The story of a tough police officer battling a gangster who is challenging the mafia boss. Their mutual obsession with outdoing each other takes a toll on their personal lives

programme.desc: Various residents and career-criminals face challenges in crime-laden Mumbai.
